testedFlows.name: Calculator quote flow
testedFlows.result: quote_request_start and quote_request_submit_success were observed, and both GA4 tags completed.

testedFlows.name: Contact form flow
testedFlows.result: contact_form_submit_success was observed, and its GA4 tag completed.

testedFlows.name: Cotizar main form
testedFlows.result: Backend submission succeeded, the UI displayed an SCB reference, and Flow 1 instrumentation was confirmed in the correct success branch.

testedFlows.name: Cotizar AI chat inline quote flow
testedFlows.result: quote_request_start and quote_request_submit_success were observed, and both GA4 tags completed.

eventResults.notes: The event was observed in the dataLayer and GA4 - quote_request_start completed. Duplicate firing, PII, and raw click IDs were not independently assessed in the supplied manual evidence.

The event was observed after a successful quote submission and GA4 - quote_request_submit_success completed. Duplicate firing, PII, and raw click IDs were not independently assessed in the supplied manual evidence.

The event was observed after successful form submission and GA4 - contact_form_submit_success completed. Duplicate firing, PII, and raw click IDs were not independently assessed in the supplied manual evidence.

eventResults.pageOrFlow: Cotizar AI chat inline quote flow - https://crbox.cr/cotizar.html
eventResults.notes: The event was observed after the deployed Flow 2 tracking fix and GA4 - quote_request_start completed. Duplicate firing, PII, and raw click IDs were not independently assessed in the supplied manual evidence.

eventResults.pageOrFlow: Cotizar AI chat inline quote flow - https://crbox.cr/cotizar.html
eventResults.notes: The event was observed after successful AI chat quote submission and GA4 - quote_request_submit_success completed. Duplicate firing, PII, and raw click IDs were not independently assessed in the supplied manual evidence.
